motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def maxPalindromes(s: str, k: int) -> int:
    n = len(s)
    max_count = 0
    for i in range(n - k + 1):
        for j in range(i + k - 1):
            substring = s[i:j + 1]
            if len(substring) >= k and substring == substring[::-1]:
                max_count += 1
    return max_count

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n^2)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
